---
title: "AgriDataTools Package Guide"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{AgriDataTools Package Guide}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

  # AgriDataTools Guide
  Welcome to the official deployment user guide for the AgriDataTools agricultural research package.

## Execution Example
```r
library(AgriDataTools)
# Core analysis engine initialization ready.
